audit_result.proof_trace: validateBlockDataColumnSidecars validates kzgProofs.length == kzgCommitments.length (L324) but does NOT validate column.length == kzgCommitments.length. cellIndices/cells arrays use column.length (L346-347) while commitments/proofs use kzgCommitments.length (L345,348), allowing mismatched array lengths to reach asyncVerifyCellKzgProofBatch (L353).
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker sends DataColumnSidecar via sync protocol (downloadByRoot/downloadByRange) where column.length != kzgCommitments.length. validateBlockDataColumnSidecars builds arrays with mismatched lengths and passes them to native KZG library, causing undefined behavior, incorrect verification, or crash.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-037.text: verify_cell_kzg_proof_batch must receive consistent-length arrays for valid verification.
